summary: Represents the customer’s voice within the CI‑OS, translating customer needs, feedback, and pain points into actionable improvement requirements.
responsibilities: Collect, analyze, and synthesize customer feedback from surveys, support channels, and direct interactions
Translate customer needs into operational and quality requirements for the CI‑OS
Collaborate with Product Owners and Process Engineers to ensure improvements enhance customer value
Monitor customer satisfaction metrics and identify trends or emerging issues
Participate in root-cause analysis for customer-impacting defects or service failures
Provide customer-centric insights during PDCA cycles and improvement workshops
Maintain customer personas, journey maps, and value definitions
Ensure customer requirements are reflected in standard work, SOPs, and training materials
Support communication of customer-impacting changes to internal teams
Validate improvement outcomes through customer feedback loops
authorities: Request cross-functional investigations into customer issues
Approve customer-facing communication related to CI‑OS changes
decisionRights: Validation of improvement impact on customer experience
kaizenCapabilities: Identification of customer-facing waste and friction
Support for frontline improvements that enhance customer value
Participation in value stream mapping with a customer lens
cqiCapabilities: Integration of customer metrics into CQI dashboards
Support for root-cause analysis of customer issues

constraints: Customer data must comply with privacy and regulatory standards
